title: BCI Converter Contract v1
description: Formal contract for tools converting external EEG datasets to bci-feature-envelope-v1 NDJSON.

schemaVersion.description: Version of the converter contract schema.

contractId.description: Stable identifier for this converter contract configuration.

inputFormats.description: List of supported raw EEG container formats for this converter.

outputFormat.description: Output format; must be NDJSON lines matching bci-feature-envelope-v1.

featureSet.description: Declared feature keys the converter will emit into bci-feature-envelope-v1 envelopes.

anonymizationPolicy.description: Requirements for data anonymization enforced by this converter.

dropsSubjectIds.description: Converter must never emit any subject identifiers.

dropsRawWaveforms.description: Converter must not emit raw waveforms; only derived features are allowed.

dropsDemographics.description: Converter must not emit demographic attributes.

dropsMedicalHistory.description: Converter must not emit medical history details.

licenseCompliance.description: Dataset license metadata and compliance switches for this conversion pipeline.

licenseId.description: SPDX-like license identifier or dataset license tag.

allowsDerivedFeatures.description: Indicates if the license allows computing and storing derived EEG features.

attributionRequired.description: Whether downstream usages must include dataset attribution.

tooling.description: Implementation details for the converter tool.

backend.description: Primary implementation stack for the converter.

version.description: Version of the converter implementation, independent of schemaVersion.
